steps.title: Backsolve $\frac{8}{27}$
steps.content:
Backsolve $\frac{8}{27}$:
$$f\left(\frac{8}{27}\right)=\sqrt{3\cdot\frac{8}{27}+8}=\sqrt{\frac{8}{9}+8}=\sqrt{\frac{80}{9}}=\frac{\sqrt{80}}{3}\approx 2.98$$
$$-9\cdot\frac{8}{27}=-\frac{8}{3}\approx -2.67$$
Since the left-hand side is positive and the right-hand side is negative, they cannot be equal, so $\frac{8}{27}$ is not correct.

steps.title: Test $-\frac{8}{27}$
steps.content:
Test $-\frac{8}{27}$:
$$f\left(-\frac{8}{27}\right)=\sqrt{3\cdot\left(-\frac{8}{27}\right)+8}=\sqrt{-\frac{8}{9}+8}=\sqrt{\frac{64}{9}}=\frac{8}{3}$$
$$-9\cdot\left(-\frac{8}{27}\right)=\frac{72}{27}=\frac{8}{3}$$
Both sides equal $\frac{8}{3}$, so the equation holds.
That is the correct answer.
